videos.headline: Tre Stewart tightropes the sideline for a Jax State TD
videos.description: Tre Stewart stays in bounds as he tightropes the sideline for a Jacksonville State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tre Stewart tightropes the sideline for a Jax State TD) 2024/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jax State comes away with a safety then scores to pad their lead
videos.description: Jacksonville State's defense comes away with a safety, which results in Tyler Huff finding a wide-open Tre Steward for a Gamecocks touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jax State comes away with a safety then scores to pad their lead) 2024/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: New Mexico State's Monte Watkins carted off in the 2nd quarter
videos.description: New Mexico State's wide receiver Monte Watkins is carted off the field on a stretcher after being tackled in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (New Mexico State's Monte Watkins carted off in the 2nd quarter) 2024/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tre Stewart breaks free for his 3rd TD of the night
videos.description: Tre Stewart's third touchdown pads the Gamecocks' lead in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tre Stewart breaks free for his 3rd TD of the night) 2024/10/09 ESHEET

videos.headline: Tyler Huff keeps it himself for a Jax State TD
videos.description: Tyler Huff keeps the rock on the play-action and rumbles across the goal line to pad the Gamecocks' lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tyler Huff keeps it himself for a Jax State TD) 2024/10/09 ESHEET
